name: OEL (Holdings) Limited
summary: OEL (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property management business in Singapore. It is also involved in the rental of properties; and ship repairing business. The company was formerly known as Oakwell Engineering Limited and changed its name to OEL (Holdings) Limited in November 2013. OEL (Holdings) Limited was founded in 1984 and is based in Singapore.
